changelog: VideoOSD.xml self-destruct timer: when the toolbar is opened via Enter/center-button, Kodi doesn't fire onfocus for the initial default control, so no alarm was ever set and the bar lingered forever. Adds an <onload> AlarmClock guarded by !System.HasAlarm so it doesn't stomp on focus-driven alarms. Pair with the 1.0.6 Includes_Actions.xml gate-removal — together they cover all 5 OSD-open paths (spacebar, mouse hover, arrow keys, Enter-to-open, Enter-on-button).
